properties.bottom_line: Large human-triggered, wet snow avalanches are possible as snow warms in the heat of the day. Evaluate snow and weather conditions carefully for signs of rapid warming. Mushy, wet snow that you can sink up to your boot tops is a warning sign that the snow is unstable. Natural and human-triggered wet slab avalanches two to four feet thick have occurred over the past three days in our forecast area, all of them have been large enough to easily bury a person.

Large human-triggered, wet snow avalanches are possible as snow warms in the heat of the day. Evaluate snow and weather conditions carefully for signs of rapid warming.
